title: Autotel EventCatalog Stamp Summary v0.1.0
description: Machine-readable summary written by `autotel-eventcatalog stamp --summary-output`. CI workflows gate on `hadChanges` to detect 'this PR forgot to re-stamp'.

attempted.description: Total snapshot events the stamp run considered (matched + skipped).

skipped.description: Snapshot events with no matching catalog entry.

inserts.description: Files where a stamp block was inserted for the first time.

replaces.description: Files where an existing stamp block was replaced (regardless of whether content actually changed).

changedFiles.description: Files whose contents actually changed on disk (or would change in dry-run).

hadChanges.description: True iff the run produced (or would produce) at least one real change.
